definitions.text: To locate To encounter or discover by accident; to happen upon.
examples: I found this shell on the beach.
She arrived home to find that the house had gone up in flames.

definitions.text: To encounter or discover by accident; to happen upon.
examples: I found this shell on the beach.
She arrived home to find that the house had gone up in flames.

definitions.text: To encounter or discover something being searched for; to locate.
examples: I found my car keys. They were under the couch.
I went looking for you in the bed we share, but tonight I found you not there.

definitions.text: Anything that is found (usually valuable), as objects on an archeological site or a person with talent.

examples: (Can we add an example for this sense?)
